_readme: 타임스탬프 v6 — whisper 단어 단위 실측 (base.en, word_timestamps)
title: look after ~ for me

sentences.en: ★ You look after our place for me, all right?
Hey, can I use your truck while you're gone?
sentences.ko: 저기, 아빠 없는 동안 트럭 좀 써도 돼요?

sentences.en: You mean your truck? I'll make sure they bring it back.
sentences.ko: 네 트럭 말이냐? 꼭 돌려보내라고 해두마.
